message:
test(wave-20): add 31 unit tests for trace/tla_export, runtime/deadline_monitor

Cover TlaTaskState/TlaRegionState/TlaObligationState Display/Debug/Clone/Copy/Eq,
TlaStateSnapshot apply, format helpers, and AdaptiveDeadlineConfig/MonitorConfig/
WarningReason/DeadlineMonitor config accessor and callback registration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
